titleStmt.title: SII 26.494: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 494. (A.R. No. 470 of 1909.) ĀḺVĀR-TIRUNAGARI, TIRUCHENDUR TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is a copy of that dealt with under No. 493 above. Its continuation is, however, missing. It gives in detail the boundaries of the gift land in Peruṅguḷam. Among the boundaries the places Śīvaikundam alias Irājēntirach-chaturvvēdimaṅgalam, Śiṅgaṉkurichchi and Tiruttuṉai Villimaṅgalam, figure.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmalart tiruvum porucey maṭantaiyut tāmaraik kuvimulaiccayappuyat tiruppa vetanāviṉ veḷḷiyataṉ tāmarai
kātaṉ mātu kaviṉpeṟat taḷaippa veṇṭirai yuṭutta maṇṭiṇi kiṭakkai tiruni[la maṭantai �maiyil kaḷippac] camaiyamum nitiyu
tarumamun taḻaippa vimaiyavar vi(ḷā)ḻākkoṭi Iṭantoṟumeṭuppak karuṅkali kaṉal keṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiyararun toḻil veḻvic
ceṅkaṇal vaḷara curutiyun tamiḻuṅ tolvaḷaṅ kulavapporu tiṟalāḻi pūtalañ cūḻavar Oru kai Irucevi mumata nāṟkoṭṭayirāpatamu
tal ceyir tira koṟṟat teṇṭicaiyāṉai Eruttameṟk kaṇṭa nāṭemateṉa kayal kaḷitarak kocalan tuḷuvaṅkukiraṅ kuccaram pocaḷa
makatam poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅkaliṅkam Īḻaṅ kaṭāraṅ kevuṭan teliṅkañ coṉakañ ciṉa mutalāya vitimuṟai tikaḻa veṟuvakutta mu
tu nilakkiḻamaiyiṉ muṭipuṉai ventaṟkoru taṉināyakaṉeṉṟulaketta tirumuṭicūṭi ceṅkoloccik koṟṟat taraḷak kuḷir ku
ṭai niḻaṟ kaṟṟaikkavari kāvalar vicamiṭai katirnavamaṇi virasiṅhāsaṉattuṭaṉ muṭicūṭiyuyar kulatiruveṉa paṅkaya malar karaṅ kuvittu
pāttipar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉic cuṭaroḷi malivucuṭar maṇimicaiyil civanta viṇai malaṟ ciṟaṭik kamala matukaraṅkamalam meṉṟa
ṇuku mulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷakkiya komutaṟ komāṟa paṉmarāṉa tripuvaḷaccakkaravattikaḷ ci cunta
rapāṇṭiya tevaṟku patinoṉṟāvatu nāḷ nāṉūṟṟaṟupattañciṉāl māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaik koyiṟ paḷḷiyaṟaik kūṭattup paḷḷippiṭa maḻava
rāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭu tirukkurukūr poliñcuniṉṟaruḷiṉa paramasvāmikaḷ koyiṟ tiruppati civaiṣṇavar ceyyat tiruvāy mo
ḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ipparamasvāmikaḷukku vaṭatalaic cempiṉāṭṭu kiḻaikkoṭumaḷūrāṉa maturotaiyanallūr Araiyaṉ tirunā
ṭu ṭaiyāṉāṉa nilakaṅkaraiyar perāl Araiyaṉ pūvaṉāṉa veṇāvuṭaiyār kaṇṭa tirunāṭuṭaiyāṉ cantikkum Ivveṇāvuṭai
yār piṟanta Uttiraṭṭāti nāḷ tiṟtaprasādippatāka kaṇṭa cittirait tirunāḷ patiṉaiñcukkum tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇ
ṭum nimantaṅkaḷukkum tirunāḷpaṭikkum Innāṭṭuc civaikuntamāṉa Irājentiraccaturvetimaṅkalattuk kiḻ piṭākaiyil Eḻurkai
kkoḷar jivitamāy ponta kāvālikku kiḻellai Ivvirājentiraścaturvedi- maṅkalattu sabhaiyār paṟṟāṉa kiḻaikkāvālikkum ciṅka
ṉkuṟicci paṟṟukkum peruṅkuḷamāṉa Uttamapāṇṭiyanallūrkku nirpāykiṟa peruṅkālukku meṟkkum teṉṉellai tiruttuṉai villimaṅka
lattu Aravintalocaṉaṉ tevatāṉattukkum Ivirājentiraścaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyār paṟṟāṉa paḷḷiyaṟai paṟṟukkum pūṉaikkuṭiya
ṉ paṟṟukku vaṭakkum melellai tirukkurukūr brahmavidvāṉkaḷ maṭapuṟamāṉa putuvurkkaraikkum Ivirājentiraścaturvetimaṅ
kalattu sabhaiyār paṟṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ivirājentiraścaturvetimaṅkalattu niṉṟum peruṅkuḷamāṉa Uttama pāṇContinuation is missing.
Digital edition of SII 26.494 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
